verses.6: Illa AAala azwajihim aw ma malakat aymanuhum fainnahum ghayru maloomeena
verses.7: Famani ibtagha waraa thalika faolaika humu alAAadoona
verses.11: Allatheena yarithoona alfirdawsa hum feeha khalidoona
verses.12: Walaqad khalaqna alinsana min sulalatin min teenin
verses.13: Thumma jaAAalnahu nutfatan fee qararin makeenin
verses.14: Thumma khalaqna alnnutfata AAalaqatan fakhalaqna alAAalaqata mudghatan fakhalaqna almudghata AAithaman fakasawna alAAithama lahman thumma anshanahu khalqan akhara fatabaraka Allahu ahsanu alkhaliqeena
verses.17: Walaqad khalaqna fawqakum sabAAa taraiqa wama kunna AAani alkhalqi ghafileena
verses.18: Waanzalna mina alssamai maan biqadarin faaskannahu fee alardi wainna AAala thahabin bihi laqadiroona
verses.19: Faanshana lakum bihi jannatin min nakheelin waaAAnabin lakum feeha fawakihu katheeratun waminha takuloona
verses.20: Washajaratan takhruju min toori saynaa tanbutu bialdduhni wasibghin lilakileena
verses.21: Wainna lakum fee alanAAami laAAibratan nusqeekum mimma fee butooniha walakum feeha manafiAAu katheeratun waminha takuloona
verses.23: Walaqad arsalna noohan ila qawmihi faqala ya qawmi oAAbudoo Allaha ma lakum min ilahin ghayruhu afala tattaqoona
verses.24: Faqala almalao allatheena kafaroo min qawmihi ma hatha illa basharun mithlukum yureedu an yatafaddala AAalaykum walaw shaa Allahu laanzala malaikatan ma samiAAna bihatha fee abaina alawwaleena
verses.25: In huwa illa rajulun bihi jinnatun fatarabbasoo bihi hatta heenin
verses.27: Faawhayna ilayhi ani isnaAAi alfulka biaAAyunina wawahyina faitha jaa amruna wafara alttannooru faosluk feeha min kullin zawjayni ithnayni waahlaka illa man sabaqa AAalayhi alqawlu minhum wala tukhatibnee fee allatheena thalamoo innahum mughraqoona
verses.28: Faitha istawayta anta waman maAAaka AAala alfulki faquli alhamdu lillahi allathee najjana mina alqawmi alththalimeena
verses.29: Waqul rabbi anzilnee munzalan mubarakan waanta khayru almunzileena
verses.30: Inna fee thalika laayatin wain kunna lamubtaleena
verses.31: Thumma anshana min baAAdihim qarnan akhareena
verses.32: Faarsalna feehim rasoolan minhum ani oAAbudoo Allaha ma lakum min ilahin ghayruhu afala tattaqoona
verses.33: Waqala almalao min qawmihi allatheena kafaroo wakaththaboo biliqai alakhirati waatrafnahum fee alhayati alddunya ma hatha illa basharun mithlukum yakulu mimma takuloona minhu wayashrabu mimma tashraboona
verses.34: Walain ataAAtum basharan mithlakum innakum ithan lakhasiroona
verses.35: AyaAAidukum annakum itha mittum wakuntum turaban waAAithaman annakum mukhrajoona
verses.37: In hiya illa hayatuna alddunya namootu wanahya wama nahnu bimabAAootheena
verses.38: In huwa illa rajulun iftara AAala Allahi kathiban wama nahnu lahu bimumineena
verses.41: Faakhathathumu alssayhatu bialhaqqi fajaAAalnahum ghuthaan fabuAAdan lilqawmi alththalimeena
verses.42: Thumma anshana min baAAdihim quroonan akhareena
verses.43: Ma tasbiqu min ommatin ajalaha wama yastakhiroona
verses.44: Thumma arsalna rusulana tatra kulla ma jaa ommatan rasooluha kaththaboohu faatbaAAna baAAdahum baAAdan wajaAAalnahum ahadeetha fabuAAdan liqawmin la yuminoona
verses.45: Thumma arsalna moosa waakhahu haroona biayatina wasultanin mubeenin
verses.46: Ila firAAawna wamalaihi faistakbaroo wakanoo qawman AAaleena
verses.47: Faqaloo anuminu libasharayni mithlina waqawmuhuma lana AAabidoona
verses.49: Walaqad atayna moosa alkitaba laAAallahum yahtadoona
verses.50: WajaAAalna ibna maryama waommahu ayatan waawaynahuma ila rabwatin thati qararin wamaAAeenin
verses.51: Ya ayyuha alrrusulu kuloo mina alttayyibati waiAAmaloo salihan innee bima taAAmaloona AAaleemun
verses.52: Wainna hathihi ommatukum ommatan wahidatan waana rabbukum faittaqooni
verses.53: FataqattaAAoo amrahum baynahum zuburan kullu hizbin bima ladayhim farihoona
verses.55: Ayahsaboona annama numidduhum bihi min malin wabaneena
verses.56: NusariAAu lahum fee alkhayrati bal la yashAAuroona
verses.57: Inna allatheena hum min khashyati rabbihim mushfiqoona
verses.60: Waallatheena yutoona ma ataw waquloobuhum wajilatun annahum ila rabbihim rajiAAoona
verses.61: Olaika yusariAAoona fee alkhayrati wahum laha sabiqoona
verses.62: Wala nukallifu nafsan illa wusAAaha waladayna kitabun yantiqu bialhaqqi wahum la yuthlamoona
verses.63: Bal quloobuhum fee ghamratin min hatha walahum aAAmalun min dooni thalika hum laha AAamiloona
verses.64: Hatta itha akhathna mutrafeehim bialAAathabi itha hum yajaroona
verses.65: La tajaroo alyawma innakum minna la tunsaroona
verses.66: Qad kanat ayatee tutla AAalaykum fakuntum AAala aAAqabikum tankisoona
verses.68: Afalam yaddabbaroo alqawla am jaahum ma lam yati abaahumu alawwaleena
verses.69: Am lam yaAArifoo rasoolahum fahum lahu munkiroona
verses.70: Am yaqooloona bihi jinnatun bal jaahum bialhaqqi waaktharuhum lilhaqqi karihoona
verses.71: Walawi ittabaAAa alhaqqu ahwaahum lafasadati alssamawatu waalardu waman feehinna bal ataynahum bithikrihim fahum AAan thikrihim muAAridoona
verses.72: Am tasaluhum kharjan fakharaju rabbika khayrun wahuwa khayru alrraziqeena
verses.74: Wainna allatheena la yuminoona bialakhirati AAani alssirati lanakiboona
verses.75: Walaw rahimnahum wakashafna ma bihim min durrin lalajjoo fee tughyanihim yaAAmahoona
verses.76: Walaqad akhathnahum bialAAathabi fama istakanoo lirabbihim wama yatadarraAAoona
verses.77: Hatta itha fatahna AAalayhim baban tha AAathabin shadeedin itha hum feehi mublisoona
verses.78: Wahuwa allathee anshaa lakumu alssamAAa waalabsara waalafidata qaleelan ma tashkuroona
verses.79: Wahuwa allathee tharaakum fee alardi wailayhi tuhsharoona
verses.80: Wahuwa allathee yuhyee wayumeetu walahu ikhtilafu allayli waalnnahari afala taAAqiloona
verses.81: Bal qaloo mithla ma qala alawwaloona
verses.82: Qaloo aitha mitna wakunna turaban waAAithaman ainna lamabAAoothoona
verses.83: Laqad wuAAidna nahnu waabaona hatha min qablu in hatha illa asateeru alawwaleena
verses.84: Qul limani alardu waman feeha in kuntum taAAlamoona
verses.86: Qul man rabbu alssamawati alssabAAi warabbu alAAarshi alAAatheemi
verses.88: Qul man biyadihi malakootu kulli shayin wahuwa yujeeru wala yujaru AAalayhi in kuntum taAAlamoona
verses.91: Ma ittakhatha Allahu min waladin wama kana maAAahu min ilahin ithan lathahaba kullu ilahin bima khalaqa walaAAala baAAduhum AAala baAAdin subhana Allahi AAamma yasifoona
verses.92: AAalimi alghaybi waalshshahadati fataAAala AAamma yushrikoona
verses.93: Qul rabbi imma turiyannee ma yooAAadoona
verses.94: Rabbi fala tajAAalnee fee alqawmi alththalimeena
verses.95: Wainna AAala an nuriyaka ma naAAiduhum laqadiroona
verses.96: IdfaAA biallatee hiya ahsanu alssayyiata nahnu aAAlamu bima yasifoona
verses.97: Waqul rabbi aAAoothu bika min hamazati alshshayateeni
verses.99: Hatta itha jaa ahadahumu almawtu qala rabbi irjiAAooni
verses.100: LaAAallee aAAmalu salihan feema taraktu kalla innaha kalimatun huwa qailuha wamin waraihim barzakhun ila yawmi yubAAathoona
verses.101: Faitha nufikha fee alssoori fala ansaba baynahum yawmaithin wala yatasaaloona
verses.102: Faman thaqulat mawazeenuhu faolaika humu almuflihoona
verses.103: Waman khaffat mawazeenuhu faolaika allatheena khasiroo anfusahum fee jahannama khalidoona
verses.104: Talfahu wujoohahumu alnnaru wahum feeha kalihoona
verses.105: Alam takun ayatee tutla AAalaykum fakuntum biha tukaththiboona
verses.106: Qaloo rabbana ghalabat AAalayna shiqwatuna wakunna qawman dalleena
verses.107: Rabbana akhrijna minha fain AAudna fainna thalimoona
verses.109: Innahu kana fareequn min AAibadee yaqooloona rabbana amanna faighfir lana wairhamna waanta khayru alrrahimeena
verses.110: Faittakhathtumoohum sikhriyyan hatta ansawkum thikree wakuntum minhum tadhakoona
verses.111: Innee jazaytuhumu alyawma bima sabaroo annahum humu alfaizoona
verses.112: Qala kam labithtum fee alardi AAadada sineena
verses.113: Qaloo labithna yawman aw baAAda yawmin faisali alAAaddeena
verses.114: Qala in labithtum illa qaleelan law annakum kuntum taAAlamoona
verses.115: Afahasibtum annama khalaqnakum AAabathan waannakum ilayna la turjaAAoona
verses.116: FataAAala Allahu almaliku alhaqqu la ilaha illa huwa rabbu alAAarshi alkareemi
verses.117: Waman yadAAu maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara la burhana lahu bihi fainnama hisabuhu AAinda rabbihi innahu la yuflihu alkafiroona
verses.118: Waqul rabbi ighfir wairham waanta khayru alrrahimeena
